app.title: Modern War Dominion
app.subtitle: Global Domination: Modern Warfare
phase.label: Phase 17 · v1.7.0
rotate.title: Rotate your phone
rotate.text: Modern War Dominion is designed for landscape/fullscreen play with a real map and military command panel.
home.title: Attacks now generate a visual combat report.
home.text: Military operations are no longer only small alert text. Each attack now creates a visual report with result, force used, enemy defense, losses, enemy damage and political impact.
home.sideText: After an attack, the game opens the Battle screen with the result. This makes gameplay more visible and less dependent on small text.
nation.title: Choose your starting country
nation.text: The list keeps 249 possible countries/territories. Real flags are searched in assets/flags by lowercase ISO code, such as br.png, us.png, fr.png.
map.title: World domination theater
guide.title: Headquarters and Tutorial
guide.text: Follow the campaign missions. Each mission explains the next step and grants a reward to speed up the beginning without confusion.
build.title: Regions and bases
build.text: Choose a region, build bases, level them up and repair damaged structures. Base condition now matters for defense.
production.title: Production and readiness
production.text: Production remains queue-based, and regional readiness depends on base condition and air defense.
arsenal.title: Detailed arsenal
arsenal.text: Catalog by class with stats, range, cost, upkeep and base requirements. Use it to decide what to produce.
maintenance.title: Maintenance and replacement
maintenance.text: Units lose condition over time, during attacks and operations. Keep your forces ready or they lose performance and may suffer losses.
global.title: World War III
global.text: Manage blocs, sanctions, ultimatums, invasions and nuclear crisis. Every decision can protect your nation or push the world into total war.
ai.title: Country AI
ai.text: Countries grow, mobilize and react to global tension. Use this panel to understand who is becoming dangerous.
ops.title: Military operations
ops.text: Run reconnaissance, limited strikes or combined operations. The stronger the attack, the higher the global escalation.
intel.title: Global threat
roadmap.title: Military operations now generate a mobile visual combat report.
rec.firstBaseText: Start with an Army Base in the capital. It unlocks infantry and armored production.
rec.infrastructureText: Upgrade a base or build the structure required by the arsenal.
rec.produceText: There is a unit available in the active region. Tap Produce recommended.
rec.monthText: Construction/production is in progress. Advance the month to finish it and receive new forces.
rec.worldText: Nuclear risk is high. Open World and try to de-escalate.
rec.attackText: Your country has bases and production. Choose a target, recon and attack carefully.
tutorial.title: Initial missions
tutorial.m1.title: Build your first base
tutorial.m1.text: Tap Build to start a base in the capital region.
tutorial.m2.title: Finish construction
tutorial.m2.text: Advance the month until the base becomes operational.
tutorial.m3.title: Produce first unit
tutorial.m3.text: With the base ready, produce a military unit.
tutorial.m4.title: Receive operational troops
tutorial.m4.text: Advance the month until the unit enters your army.
tutorial.m5.title: Run reconnaissance
tutorial.m5.text: Open Attack and run reconnaissance before a larger war.
tutorial.m6.title: Survive the first 3 months
tutorial.m6.text: Maintain production, resources and defense during the first months.
battle.title: Battle report
battle.text: See the result of the latest operation, losses, damage caused and global war impact.
battle.empty: No battle recorded yet. Run reconnaissance or attack a target in the Attack panel.
